title: Baked Cod with Portuguese Pasta
description: A simple and delicious recipe for baked cod served with a traditional Portuguese pasta dish.
instructions: Rinse the cod fillets and pat them dry with a paper towel.
Season the cod with salt and pepper.
In a shallow dish, mix together the olive oil, lemon juice, and garlic.
Add the cod fillets to the dish and coat them evenly with the marinade.
Transfer the cod to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the cod in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the cod is baking, cook the pasta according to the package instructions.
Drain the pasta and set it aside.
In a separate pan, heat a tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat.
Add the breadcrumbs and cook, stirring constantly, until lightly toasted.
To serve, place the cooked pasta on a plate, top with a cod fillet, and sprinkle with toasted breadcrumbs and parsley.
